Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student profile, including their locked academic year, their answers, and personal notes.

joinedAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the student registered.

answers.description: A map of completed question statuses, keyed by questionId.

notes.description: An array of clinical reminders and notes created by the student.

activeSessionToken.description: The unique token representing the currently active device/browser session.

lastActiveAt.description: The ISO timestamp of the student's latest session heartbeat.

BugReport.title: BugReport
BugReport.description: Represents a submitted curriculum error report for clinical review.

studentId.description: The unique ID of the student who submitted the report.

questionId.description: The ID of the question containing the error.

details.description: The text details describing the error.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the report was submitted.

status.description: The status of the report (e.g., Pending, Resolved).

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A custom clinical QCM question uploaded by the medical academy administrator.

correctAnswer.description: 0-based index of the correct option (0=A, 1=B, etc.).

KnownCourse.title: KnownCourse
KnownCourse.description: A user-defined medical course/topic name mapping to academic years and modules for AI guidance.

id.description: Unique identifier of the course record.

module.description: Academic module or organ system name (e.g. Cardiology).

course.description: Specific course or lecture topic (e.g. Heart Failure).

CommunityAdvice.title: CommunityAdvice
CommunityAdvice.description: A student-authored public advice post or examination reminder.

AdminEmail.title: AdminEmail
AdminEmail.description: Represents an authorized admin email address.

addedBy.description: Email of the admin who added this.

/students/{studentId}.description: Stores individual student profile records and study progress.

/bugReports/{reportId}.description: Stores curriculum error and bug signals submitted by medical students.

/questions/{questionId}.description: Stores dynamically uploaded QCM questions accessible to medical students.

/knownCourses/{courseId}.description: Stores user-defined course and module reference sheets for enhanced AI classification.

/communityAdvices/{adviceId}.description: Stores public student advices, Mnemonics and high-yield tips.
